# gars-yellow-light.theme

## brand
- main: #c9aa10
- gold: #6b5a0a

## base
- background: #fdfae8
- mantle:     #ece7c0
- base:       #f5f0d5
- crust:      #e2dcb0
- metal:      #d8d2a2

## surfaces
- surface0: #cdc79a
- surface1: #bdb78a
- surface2: #aea87c

## overlays
- overlay0: #9e986e
- overlay1: #8a8460
- overlay2: #787252

## text
- bright-foreground: #0f0d02
- foreground:        #1e1a06
- subtext1:          #332d10
- subtext0:          #48421e
- dim-foreground:    #787252

## highlights
- light-yellow: #f5e070
- beige:        #e3c220
- bright:       #c9aa10

## cursor
- cursor:         #c9aa10
- cursor-text:    #fdfae8
- vi-cursor:      #6b5a0a
- vi-cursor-text: #fdfae8

## search
- search-match-fg:   #fdfae8
- search-match-bg:   #9e986e
- search-focused-fg: #1e1a06
- search-focused-bg: #c9aa10

## footer bar
- footer-fg: #fdfae8
- footer-bg: #787252

## hints
- hints-start-fg: #fdfae8
- hints-start-bg: #c9aa10
- hints-end-fg:   #fdfae8
- hints-end-bg:   #8a8460

## selection
- selection-text: #1e1a06
- selection-bg:   #e3c220

## ansi normal (0–7) — saturated
- black:   #1e1a06
- red:     #b83030
- green:   #507800
- yellow:  #b09000
- blue:    #1850a0
- magenta: #900090
- cyan:    #007090
- white:   #cdc79a

## ansi bright (8–15) — pastel
- black:   #48421e
- red:     #c03030
- green:   #5a8a00
- yellow:  #c9aa10
- blue:    #1a5ab0
- magenta: #b0005a
- cyan:    #0080a0
- white:   #f5f0d5

## indexed
- 16 / orange: #b85010
- 17 / gold:   #6b5a0a

## accents
- red:     normal #b83030 / bright #c03030
- orange:  #b85010
- green:   normal #507800 / bright #5a8a00
- cyan:    normal #007090 / bright #0080a0
- blue:    normal #1850a0 / bright #1a5ab0
- magenta: #900090
- pink:    #b0005a
